calendar.matters:
Petition For Order That Assets Constitute Trust Assets
Off Calendar Jun-09-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mark Bridges, in court, for and with Robert Wu, Petitioner.

The court advises counsel of its tentative ruling to deny the request as to the Spruce Street property and grant the request as to all other assets and mentions probate code 6300 for counsel's reference. Counsel testifies that as a court of equity and that the decedent's intention was to transfer the Spruce Street property to the trust but passed-away before doing so. Counsel offers additional testimony to support his position that the court also grant the request to include the request to confirm that the decedent's interest in the Spruce Street property is a trust asset. The court advises that it will consider counsel's testimony.

The Petition is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Martinez. Not Reported.

Petition For Order That Assets Constitute Trust Assets
Off Calendar May-10-2022 Continued To Jun-01-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
